query:
-- Ver cartão de fidelidade
SELECT id, customerPhone, stamps, totalStampsEarned, couponsEarned, activeCouponId 
FROM loyaltyCards 
WHERE customerPhone LIKE '%999290000%';

-- Ver histórico de carimbos
SELECT ls.* FROM loyaltyStamps ls
JOIN loyaltyCards lc ON ls.loyaltyCardId = lc.id
WHERE lc.customerPhone LIKE '%999290000%'
ORDER BY ls.createdAt DESC;
